flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Emmanuel University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.6k → $25.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Emmanuel University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($21.6k → $25.5k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Emmanuel University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (34.6% vs 39.7%).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Emmanuel University are 2% above 6-year earnings ($37.6k → $38.2k).
